name: autocomplete
description: Text input with filtered suggestions list built on Base UI Combobox. Type to search, click or keyboard-select to fill the input.

docs.usage:
const countries = [
  { value: "us", label: "United States" },
  { value: "uk", label: "United Kingdom" },
  { value: "ca", label: "Canada" },
  { value: "au", label: "Australia" },
]

<Autocomplete
  options={countries}
  label="Country"
  placeholder="Search countries..."
  onValueChange={(val) => console.log(val)}
/>
docs.notes: Autocomplete differs from Combobox: the input is always visible and editable — users type to filter and select to fill the input value. Built on Base UI's Combobox primitive (not the same as our Select-based Combobox component).
